Julien

The SAP GUI has the same option .

entry.title: Re: transfer requirements from MRP area to MRP area in MRP

Therefore, we want to perform requirements explosion between MRP areas without going through the plant level. We want to know how to make this happen. Regards.

entry.title: Price Category if Activate/Deactivate Apps in Business Role
entry.content:
Dear,

 

Within the "Maintain Business Roles" section, there are various price categories, such as Advanced, Core, and others.

In the IAM Apps tab under "Maintain Business Roles," there are several applications listed. If I deactivate any of these applications, will the price category of the business role change?

 

Thanks! 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Price Category if Activate/Deactivate Apps in Busines...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

The Price Category is defined by the Business Catalogs that are assigned and not by the applications that are active. Therefore, even if you deactivate all the applications the Price Category will remain the same. 

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: Webservice calls on Solution manager wily introscope
entry.content:
Hello karti,.

This board is only for the welcome / greetings. Please post your query in technology Q&A to get relevant answers.!

 

Zayn

Regards

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to add the source of the journal entry?

entry.title: How to Use a Total Compensation Template for Complex Incentive Budgets
entry.content:
Sometimes we encounter complex customer requirements that involve a little more creativity to problem-solve.  Recently, a client requested that they needed actual employee historical data for budget calculations while using point in time data for calculating employee incentive outcomes, and they wanted to utilise standard functionality available in the Compensation module for multiple lumpsum components.  With a stand-alone variable pay solution, a requirement like this this presents a bit of a challenge.  Point in time calculations (where all data is derived on a single date) is possible.  Date driven time slice calculations using standard employee history data over a period of time is possible.  But having some data as at a point in time and some data over a time period, that’s complicated.  And to further compound that complication, my customer wanted to utilise the standard lumpsum fields and functionality in the Compensation module to assign guidelines and rules.

Such a requirement usually results in an Employee Central (EC) solution with complex rules and custom fields.  It’s a difficult sell for the compensation team who need to convince internal stakeholders to amend/build/tweak existing working EC configuration.

The Total Compensation template was our solution.

A typical use case for a Total Compensation template is when the compensation review process and the incentive process are run at the same time.  The worksheets exist in one template but on two tabs.  Besides the obvious benefits of one worksheet per planner, it has another benefit in that fields can be shared between both compensation and variable pay tabs.

In our customer’s case, the ability to share fields between tabs was key.  We wanted to be able to calculate the budget on the variable pay tab using employee history, pull the budget value across to the compensation tab where we could calculate an employee’s incentive outcome at a point in time all whilst utilising the standard guideline rules in multiple lumpsum fields.

Below is an example of how to achieve such a requirement using the standard functionality in a Total Compensation template where budgets are derived at the individual level by Business Unit and Country.

Prerequisites:

  • The customer’s requirement for incentive calculations otherwise fits into the capabilities of a Compensation/Variable Pay template.
  • Data points that determine both budget splits and employee target percentages or amounts are available in EC.

Variable Pay Tab (relabelled to ‘Incentive Budget’):

Standard employee history configuration is used to pull through applicable fields for the budget allocation which can be prorated by the period of time an employee spent in each Business Unit and/or Country.

The applicable employee history field (Business Unit or Country) is then mapped to the business goals to ensure the budget allocation is assigned as a business goal outcome.

At the Assignment level, a custom field is used to pull through each assignment proration amount.

At the Entry level, the ‘Proration %’ is aggregated from the Assignment Proration column at the Assignment Level (from the employee history table) to display a pro-rated percentage for any new starters (yellow box in the screenshot above)

At the Business Detail level, both the Business Unit performance and Country performance are calculated using standard business goal capabilities and aggregated at the Entry level (green circles in the screenshot above)

Lastly on the Variable Pay tab, the budget percentage allocated to each employee is calculated by multiplying the two business outcomes together (red box in the screenshot above).  This is a custom calculation.

Compensation Tab (relabeled to ‘Incentive Planning’):

Once the Proration % and Budget Multiplier fields are calculated on the Variable Pay tab, we can pull them through to the Compensation tab and use them in a point in time calculation.

In the below screenshot example, the employee’s current salary and target incentive values are taken as at the 31st December, while the Budget Multiplier (in red box below) includes historical business unit and country changes that may have occurred throughout the year.

From here, the Budget Amount is the Incentive Target multiplied by the Budget Multiplier.

The Budget Amount sum forms the total Budget Allocation and is configured using the PercentOfCustomField configuration.

From here, we were able to use all the standard Compensation module capabilities including the standard lumpSum and lumpSum2 fields along with the standard guidelines and validation rules.

This method offers a creative solution to a tricky customer incentive requirement making use of standard functionality from both the Variable Pay and Compensation modules in a Total Compensation template.

I would love to hear other creative solutions using Total Compensation in the comments.

Additional Notes:

  • The above logic could be applied to other customer requirements that require some point in time data and some time period data but still want to utilise the Compensation module standard functionality.
  • As this is built on a Total Compensation template, there are some behaviour differences to a stand-alone Variable Pay template as outlined in the Admin Guide

entry.title: Re: How to enhance Machine Learning for C4C v1
entry.content: Thanks for your reply Edwin but this one is for C4C and we don't have access on SE18. As per SDK, we only have MachineLearningInputDataPreProcessing, MachineLearningObjectPredictionWrite, and MachineLearningDataSelectionQueryWrite.

entry.title: Re: How to enhance Machine Learning for C4C v1
entry.content:
I found the answer and just sharing here:

Enhancement Option: MachineLearningObjectPredictionWrite

Overview

NameMachineLearningObjectPredictionWrite
Namespacehttp://sap.com/xi/AP/CRM/MachineLearning
DescriptionIndicator for ML Prediction
TypeMultiple Use
Deployment UnitCustomerRelationshipManagement

Public Solution Model

Release StatusReleased

Operation: IS_PREDICTION_REQUIRED

Check if ML prediction needs to be performed

Parameter Type Data Type Name Data Type Namespace

InputPredictionInputhttp://sap.com/xi/AP/CRM/MachineLearning
OutputPredictionEntrieshttp://sap.com/xi/AP/CRM/MachineLearning

Restrictions

The enhancement is only called during the save of Service Request when SAP standard logic is determining the case/need of Prediction.

Standard Business Process

In the SAP system, Ticket Classification (prediction) is performed for all Service Request if the Ticket Classification is configured.

Use

Attention: With this enhancement you can control if ticket classification is performed on Service Requests .Hence you need to exercise restraint while implementing,testing this enhancement!

Example

When a Service Request is saved , the system predicts the service category levels.

With this enhancement, you can influence system's decision and decide if there needs to be a prediction.

Parameters

Input Parameters

-ObjectTypeCode ( Cardinality 0..1)
-MachineLearningScenarioCode ( Cardinality 0..1)
-ID ( Cardinality 0..*)

Via MachineLearningScenarioCode you can identify the type of Machine Learning Scenario, for example whether it is Ticket Classification (001)

Output Parameters

BadiPredictionEntries( Cardinality 0..*)
PredictionEnabledEntry
-ID (Service Request ID)
-PREDICT ( Indicator if Prediction needs to be performed)

This means, in case you want the system to perform the Prediction you need to set the PREDICT field to true . The SAP standard logic does not fill the structure while invoking the enhancement. Also add every ticket ID supplied in the Input parameter to Output Parameter

Note : Whenever the enhancement is implemented populate the predict field for each ticket supplied. Do not have a empty implementation.

Attention:

You are not allowed to add new Service Requests to output .

Activities

Test

After the implementation of the enhancement option you can test it by saving a Service Request, you will see there is no prediction of Service Category Levels.

Example

The following example disables the prediction on tickets without Priority Code Immediate

import AP.CRM.MachineLearning;
import AP.CRM.Global;
var resultInstance : PredictionEntries.PredictionEntries;
var ServiceReq : collectionof ServiceRequest.UUID;

var result : PredictionEntries;
foreach( var ticketInstance in InputData.Object){
	ServiceReq.Add(ticketInstance);
	var instances = ServiceRequest.Retrieve(ServiceReq);
	foreach(var instance in instances){
		resultInstance.ID.content = ticketInstance.content;
		if(instance.ServiceTerms.ServicePriorityCode == "1"){
			resultInstance.Predict = true;
		}
		result.PredictionEntries.Add(resultInstance);
	}
	
}
return result;

More Information

For more information about the use case, see the SDK documentation under Getting Started > PSM. In the SDK, you can access the documentation from the Help menu.

entry.title: WHT 1099Misc report no item found "No items to report;Query DOC_SEL did not return any data."
entry.content:
Hello Folks!!!

I'm trying to run the Withholding 1099MISC report and getting this error saying no item found. 

All configuration performed in accordance with SAP requirements.

BP is set with WHT_type FE, and code 01. FI item proerply cleared. 

The requirement, which may be the issue: no WHT tax should be calculated/withheld, the client only want to issue the 1099 report describing how much was paid to the vendor. Does that make sense? 

Is it possible?

entry.title: Re: Possibility to check if there is an attachment in a P...
entry.content: Dear @AIT-LAHCEN, for now there is no standard delivered field can be used to get the status of a attachment. As a workaround you may added a custom field like 'File attached' to memo if an attached has been added, and the end-user need to set the value to ture maunully when uploading an attachment.

entry.title: Element info does not working in ADT Eclipse (2024-12)
entry.content:
Hello,

Currently, after updating to ADT Eclipse 2024-12,

I am facing an issue where I can no longer view Element Info.

 

These issues result in only a blank screen appearing instead of the expected Element Info display,

as shown below.

1) Missing Element Info in 'Code Editor Quick View' (F2) Popup

2) Missing Element Info in 'Code Completion' Popup

3) Missing Element Info in 'Preferences'

I have reinstalled Eclipse ADT multiple times, but I was unable to resolve this issue.

I would appreciate any advice or assistance you can provide.

 

Thank you in advance for your help,

GwangJin Kim.

When I try to apply the terraform config to SAP BTP Trial account, I get the below error. Any suggestions?

C:\dev\learning-terraform-on-sapbtp> terraform init
Initializing the backend...
Initializing provider plugins...
- Finding sap/btp versions matching "1.10.0"...
- Installing sap/btp v1.10.0...

Error: Failed to install provider

Error while installing sap/btp v1.10.0: archive has incorrect checksum zh:1a4c529f14ba63ca0e036b6e275046585ff2cb3850ced3ac6b623ab0d874d645 (expected
zh:1309aee48b02df677a2c19aec831243ba36a837dd4c6796c2465a6c7af14ae34)

entry.title: Re: SAP Builders, Welcome to the Application Development and Automation Group!
entry.content:
@DominikaDodson 

Dear Dominika,

Thank you for the announcement. 

I wish to know where exactly is the bug reports and feature requests follow-up management tool for SAP Build Apps.

If it is just happening in the form of discussions in the present blog post, it is not efficient and fast enough.

During SAP_Appgyver time, there was a tool used from canny.io which help closely track the bug reports and features requests with a responsible person fromSAP_Appgyver taking the lead for solving the matter. Using such a type of structured tool is needed to have precise and fast treatment of the bugs and features. Please let us know what is in place presently and what will be done/when.

Thank you

Chantal

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Applications/Programs in SAP Advanced Finan...
entry.content:
To address the issue you're experiencing with enabling SAP Fiori app use in SAP Advanced Financial Closing (AFC), consider the following steps:

  1. Synchronize Backend Data: After making changes to master data or content in your backend system, you need to synchronize this data with the frontend. To do this:

    • Open the "Specify Communication Systems" app
    • Select the affected backend system
    • Click on "Synchronize Now" [1]

  2. Verify Task Model Configuration: Ensure that you have correctly configured the task model in AFC:

    • Use task model 0100100200 for Intercompany Matching Run tasks
    • Specify the correct task name (e.g., "Intercompany Matching Run - By Company")
    • Assign the appropriate parameter type (e.g., ICMTD for Matching Method) [2][3]

  3. Check Organizational Unit Assignment:

    • Ensure that the task is assigned to the correct structural or organizational folders
    • Be aware that AFC uses Company rather than Company Code for matching jobs
    • If your company and company code don't have a one-to-one mapping, manually specify the companies before running the task [2][3]

  4. Review Fiori App Configuration:

    • Confirm that you've correctly defined the semantic object and action for each business transaction type in AFC Local Settings [4]

  5. Verify Fiscal Year and Period: When generating a task list from the template, make sure you've specified the correct fiscal year and period [2][3]

If you've followed these steps and are still experiencing issues, it may be necessary to consult with SAP support or review your specific system configuration in more detail.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Item Category D disappeared
entry.content: Dear @Mandy2025, The value is from the CDS view C_PURCONTRITEMCATEGORYVH, in the definition it can be found details below, D is not supported here. define view C_PurContrItemCategoryVH as select from I_PurgDocumentItemCategory //inner join t161p on t161p.pstyp = I_PurgDocumentItemCategory.PurchasingDocumentItemCategory association [0..1] to I_PurgDocumentItemCategoryText as _Text on $projection.PurchasingDocumentItemCategory = _Text.PurchasingDocumentItemCategory { @ObjectModel.text.element : 'PurgDocItemCategoryName' @ui.hidden: true key PurchasingDocumentItemCategory, @Semantics.text: true @search.ranking: #LOW _Text.PurgDocItemCategoryName, @ObjectModel.text.element : 'PurgDocItemCategoryName' @search.ranking: #HIGH _Text.PurgDocExternalItemCategory // t161p.bsart as PurchaseContractTypepe } where ( PurchasingDocumentItemCategory = '0' or PurchasingDocumentItemCategory = '8' or PurchasingDocumentItemCategory = '2' or PurchasingDocumentItemCategory = '3'

entry.title: Re: Sap public cloud - PIRS
entry.content: Dear @hyojeongkim, Would you please consider to create a variant in the left up coner to save the filters like plant in current page?

entry.title: Business Network GTT extractors now available as SAP standard code in S/4HANA 2023 FPS03
entry.content:
The extractor codes, provided by SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace, are now delivered as part of standard codes in SAP S/4HANA(available from S/4HANA 2023 FPS03 release,both On-Premise and private Cloud). They are ready to use and allow you to extract basic information in a logistical business document from SAP S/4HANA and send them to the GTT system for tracking.

Currently, the following TM freight documents are supported for extraction:

  • Freight Unit
  • Freight Order
  • Freight Booking

For more, see Using Standard Extractor Codes.

Key Highlights,

  • With standard delivered extractors readily available in S/4HANA, there is no need to download and install custom code from GitHub.
  • Standard SAP software maintenence and support provided for extractor code in S/4HANA
  • Standard extensibility options can be used in case to extend extractors for customer use case
  • Standard extractors available only for TM documents as of now. For S/4HANA core documents such as Sales orders, deliveries, purchase orders and STOs, custom extractor from GitHub is required.
  • Migration from existing custom extractors at customers require project level effort to adapt standard code with existing enhancements
  • This change won't impact existing enhancements done in Business Network GTT tenants(as far as custom code is adapted with standard without changing existing GTT parameters/fields).

entry.title: Custom CDS view Partner OrganizationName1 display
entry.content:
Hi Expert！

I am creating a Custom CDS view for Service Contract in Scenario: “Analytical Cube”.

I added a Partner Function to the Service Contract.
(Partner Function name Japanese”納入先"　Alias:YY1_ZIS_CUSTOM8_SRI)

I want to display address information such as "Name1" for the added Partner Function on CDSView.
Can someone please tell me how to do this?

Soma

entry.title: Withholding tax entry impacting Input tax base calculation
entry.content:
Hello, 

The client is creating a FB60 Vendor Invoice where she manually enters a Withholding tax line with an amount. Expense line item has an input tax code of 12% GST. The tax base for this calculation of 12% GST is getting reduced by WHT amount which the user doesnt want.

For e.g. Vendor amount -  1000

             WHT -  20

             Net Amount - 980

             Tax base - 980/1.12 - 875

             Tax amount - 105

            What user wants is :

           

Vendor amount -  1000

             WHT -  20

             Net Amount - 1000

             Tax base - 1000/1.12 - 892.86

             Tax amount - 107.14

Expense Line item should be adjusted accordingly. How can this behaviour be changed?

entry.title: Re: Problem export pdf api Service Layer API
entry.content:
Hi @ANKIT_CHAUHAN 

The API Gateway module is missing.

It is now working. Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Create records in a user table using the Service Layer API
entry.content:
I need to know if it is possible to create records in user-created tables using Service Layer API?

I wanted to avoid connecting directly to the database.

entry.title: Claim Eligibility Date vs Receipt Date
entry.content:
I have created a Claim (Reimbursement) type benefit. I've added a custom field Receipt Date. However, there is a loophole to this and I'll need to add some sort of validation. The issue is that the employee could have a past dated Receipt and claim for it once they are eligible.

For example:

  • Receipt: 01 Dec 2024 -> Employee is not yet eligible for claims yet as of this date
  • Claim Date: 01 Jan 2025 -> Employee becomes eligible (based on eligibility rule) and claims the 01 Dec 2024 receipt on this date. This scenario is not allowed and a validation check must be in place.

I have to add a validation that the receipt must be on or after the employee's actual eligibility date.

What i did so far:

  • Added a custom field in Job Info to auto-populate via a rule, with the event date that the employee becomes eligible. The eligibility rule only relies on job info data for eligibility criteria.
    • This works for new hires/rehires.
  • For existing employees, this field must be auto-populated. However, there can be multiple records already for the employee.
    • Ex. Employee has 5 job info records. After the hire record (2nd record), the employee becomes eligible. So the 2nd record must be auto-populated first before the succeeding records. To refresh the rules, it must be from oldest to newest record. We cannot update the 5th record first as it will take that date instead of the 2nd record's date.

Is there another way to add a validation to this scenario?

entry.title: BUSINESS ROUND EVENT - 44ª edição
entry.content:
Temos o prazer de anunciar que SAP COMMUNITY CWB esta apoiando e participará do mais famoso encontro de networking de Curitiba, a cidade do ecossistema de inovação Vale do Pinhão

BUSINESS ROUND!!! O nosso encontro de negócios da inovação!

Venha fazer amizades e negócios participando do mais famoso encontro de networking de Curitiba, a cidade do ecossistema de inovação Vale do Pinhão. Essa será a 44ª edição do maior encontro de negócios do Vale do Pinhão, que acontecerá no dia 17 de fevereiro, segunda-feira, a partir das 18h30, no SPOT Compact Mall, localizado na Av. Vicente Machado, 520 - Centro.

Você poderá se inscrever para fazer seu pitch de negócios, participar do open mic ou divulgar eventos e oportunidades. Nesta edição especial, você também poderá dar seu depoimento de agradecimento ou reconhecimento a alguém ou algo que aconteceu por conta do Business Round.

Faça já sua inscrição e garanta sua vaga! Conecte-se e sinta a energia do Vale do Pinhão, o nosso ecossistema de inovação de Curitiba.

O Business Round é um evento da Agência Curitiba de Desenvolvimento e Inovação que tem o objetivo de promover negócios e networking em um clima informal e divertido. O evento é gratuito e reúne representantes de startups, investidores, empresários, pesquisadores, estudantes, gestores públicos e interessados em negócios de tecnologia e inovação.

ACESSE E GARANTA A SUA VAGA!!!

entry.title: Re: Media content field value disappeared after draftActivate
entry.content: version of cap java: 3.5.0

entry.title: Re: Create records in a user table using the Service Laye...
entry.content:
Hi RicardoTorresDev,

If it is a No Object type table, you can use the following request in Service Layer:

 

POST b1s/v1/U_MYTBL
{
	"Code":"C", 
	"Name":"CName", 
	"U_F1":"test data"
}

 

Where MYTBL is the table name.

Similarly, if the UDO is defined, you can use the following request:

 

POST b1s/v1/MyOrder

{
    "U_CustomerName": "c1",
    "U_DocTotal": 620,
    "MyOrderLinesCollection": [
        {
            "U_ItemName": "item1",
            "U_Price": 100,
            "U_Quantity": 3
        },
        {
            "U_ItemName": "item2",
            "U_Price": 80,
            "U_Quantity": 4
        }
    ]
}

 

Where MyOrder is the UDO name.

Hope it helps!

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Different Insurance Plan Per Dependent
entry.content:
I have a requirement where Health Insurance can be enrolled for the employee's dependent. The insurance plan varies in terms of dependent relationship, coverage, and premium amount.

Example of Insurance Plans:

  • Spouse and Child - Coverage 100k - Premium $100
  • Parents - Coverage 80k - Premium $75

Using the example above, the employee can manually enroll their spouse, child, and both parents. In the enrollment screen, employee can only select 1 insurance plan and it applies to all 3 dependent relationship but it should not be the case since Spouse and Child is under a different plan vs the Parent.

Any leads to any solution is appreciated!

entry.title: Re: Create records in a user table using the Service Laye...
entry.content:
@ANKIT_CHAUHAN 

Thank you, it solved my problem.

entry.title: Re: Need help with X015 and X115 PCRs
entry.content:
Thanks @corriveau and @sikindar... Appreciate your responses. I understand the logic that is executed..

What exactly is

ADDNA *?

FILLF N?

WGTYP=*

why has SAP used these operations? I tried to read the documentation, but I felt it to be slightly confusing. It would be great if you could help me with this.

I tried to use PRINT operations to understand, but it is even more confusing when I see the results. Pls see attached screenshot.

Thanks!

The process I followed was I raised a support ticket to SAP sharing my certificate details which is available in the learning history. The dates were extended immediately.

entry.title: Re: When testing PunchOut Catalogue, items are not being Added to Cart?
entry.content: Hi SiruiLiu. The Cart page is actually in both? It is a stand alone WooCommerce built site that has been made PunchOut ready. The Non-ability to Add to Cart only occurs when the site is loaded within the ERP (Sap Ariba)? Thanks for the comment and interest.

entry.title: Re: TestSuite Analytics: Download to excel
entry.content:
I tested the following reports in SAP internal standard systems (solman 7.2 SP15, SP19 and SP20).

  • Test Plan – Test Packages Analysis: Test Note ja Test result icons is missing
  • Test Plan – Test Cases Analysis: Test Note, Test result ja Overall status icons is missing

and got the following results:

It works for solman 7.2 SP15 and SP20, the icons can be displayed in the download excel file.

The issue only occurs on solman 7.2 SP19. It should be a bug for solman 7.2 SP19. The focused build developer needs to be involved to fix the bug. Please raise an incident under the component SV-SMG-OST-FB-TWB with the issue details. (It will be better to provide a sample with some screenshots.)

Hi there, any idea why the User Management REST API isn't documented in the Business Accellorator Hub? I'm trying to create a CAP service that calls that API and I'm running into some issues (related to Posting).

I'm getting a 415: Unsupported Media Type error only when I call the API in my CAP service. It works fine im Postman. Same headers and payload. 

It would be nice to get more information on this API.

entry.title: Re: REDUCE a decilmal value

entry.title: Re: Need help with X015 and X115 PCRs
entry.content: ADDNA it adds the number which is in input table , FILLF N fill the number from the input

entry.title: SAP Activate for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition now available by Deployment Journey
entry.content:
Effective March 10, 2025, we are introducing a change to the way you access SAP Activate roadmaps for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition in the SAP Activate road map viewer. 

Previously, the New Implementation, System Conversion, and Selective Data Transition journeys were available under a single roadmap, with filtering options to refine your view by scenario. To provide a clearer, more structured approach, we are now offering three distinct roadmaps, each dedicated to its respective deployment journey while still following the SAP Activate methodology framework. 

What's Changing? 

🔹Before: A single implementation roadmap with filters/tags for different transition paths.

🔹After: Three standalone implementation roadmaps, each tailored for a specific deployment journey: 

✔️SAP Activate for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - New Implementation

✔️SAP Activate for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - System Conversion

✔️SAP Activate for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - Selective Data Transition

How Does this Benefit You?

  • More clarity when navigating your RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition deployment journey
  • Content streamlined and structured for each scenario
  • Easier access and management: simply save the link/roadmaps as favorite

Action Required

Starting March 10, 2025, please update your saved roadmaps and add them to your favorites list. 

🙂We Value Your Feedback! 

We want to ensure these changes enhance your experience. Let us know your thoughts! Do you find this new structure helpful? Are there any improvements you'd like to see in the future? Share your feedback with us by using the feedback functionality in SAP Activate road map viewer. 

Thank you for your continued engagement with SAP Activate!

entry.title: UI for SAP Build Apps / Apps Editor looks different
entry.content: Hi, I was trying to follow the tutorial on creating an App using SAP Build Apps editor. I noticed that the user interface to create the REST API Integration looks different between the Trial BTP platform and the one on the tutorial. I was not able to complete the exercise after creating the Data configuration.

I am facing error like 10000304 - Invalid currency.

Here, All G/L (CoA) are marked as an All Currency. 

Business partner are marked as their respective currency.

What is the issue here? 

SAP B1, SAP Business One, SBO

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: SAP public cloud（es） can't configure material number according to material type
entry.content: SAP ES can't configure material number according to material type.

entry.title: Re: New Recruiting Offer Letter Template Rules - 1H 2024

Hi Experts,

Can I know if there is a workaround for the spacing issue when a dynamic token does not populate any data in the offer letter?

Kind regards,

Calvin

entry.title: Printing a single page from multiple pages using Crystal Reports Viewer
entry.content:
Please tell us how to print only one specified page from a multi-page document
using Crystal Report Viewer in a Windows 11.
Printing is done by selecting the [Print] button in Crystal Report Viewer.
To print, use the Windows print dialog to specify the pages.
We want to print the page we want to print without previewing it in Crystal Report Viewer,
but even if we specify a page, the previewed page gets printed.
We can print multiple pages as specified, but we cannot print just one page.

Our development environment is as follows.

Windows 11 Pro(23H2)
Microsoft Visual Studio 2022(64bit)Version 17.13.0
Microsoft .NET Framework 4.8
SAP Crystal Reports 2020 SP4 Patch100(64bit)
SAP Crystal Reports, version for Microsoft Visual Studio(SP37)(64bit)
SAP Crystal Reports for Visual Studio(SP37) CR_runtime(64bit)
SAP Crystal Reports for Visual Studio(SP37) Merge Modules(64bit)

In addition, in a Windows 10, we could print just one page.

entry.title: Get Data from https://smard.api.bund.dev/ not working (complete ABAP-Code is in post)
entry.content:
Good morning,

I have to code some ABAP to receive data from https://smard.api.bund.dev/

For my first attemped I used the URL "https://smard.api.proxy.bund.dev/app/chart_data/1223/DE/index_hour.json"

When I use this URL in the browser I see/get

 

 

I created a SM59 connection:

 

 

My code is:

 

  DATA: lo_http_client TYPE REF TO if_http_client,
        lv_url         TYPE        string.


  cl_http_client=>create_by_destination(
      EXPORTING
          destination = 'BUNDESNETZAGENTURSTROMMARKTDATEN'
      IMPORTING
          client = lo_http_client " HTTP Client object
      EXCEPTIONS
           argument_not_found = 1
           destination_not_found = 2
           destination_no_authority = 3
           plugin_not_active = 4
           internal_error = 5
           OTHERS = 6 ).

  lo_http_client->request->set_method( if_http_request=>co_request_method_post ).
  lo_http_client->request->set_version( if_http_request=>co_protocol_version_1_1 ).
  lv_url =
  '/app/chart_data/1223/DE/index_hour.json'.

  CALL METHOD cl_http_utility=>set_request_uri
    EXPORTING
      request = lo_http_client->request
      uri     = lv_url.


  lo_http_client->request->set_content_type( 'application/json' ).
  CALL METHOD lo_http_client->send "sending request to api
    EXCEPTIONS
      http_communication_failure = 1
      http_invalid_state         = 2.

  CALL METHOD lo_http_client->receive "receiving response from api
    EXCEPTIONS
      http_communication_failure = 1
      http_invalid_state         = 2
      http_processing_failed     = 3.

  DATA:
*        http_status TYPE string,
        reason      TYPE string,
        response    TYPE string.

  CALL METHOD lo_http_client->response->get_status
    IMPORTING
      code   = data(http_status)
      reason = reason.

  response = lo_http_client->response->get_cdata( ).
*  cl_demo_output=>display_json( json = json_response ).
  cl_demo_output=>display_text( text =  response ).

 

But my ABAP Code displays only:

 

What I am doing wrong

entry.title: Re: Integrating with the Alerts System API in SAP Service Cloud V2
entry.content: Great Blog and Thanks for Good Community Asset, keep it up 👍

entry.title: Re: Integrating with the Alerts System API in SAP Service Cloud V2
entry.content: @yogananda/@Saurabh_Kabra  : Thank you for pointing this out. This is a feature flag that needs to be enabled by requesting it from the backend product team.

entry.title: APIs to Fetch Business Partner Blocked using ILM in S4HANA public cloud
entry.content:
Need assistance with retrieving Business Partner details in S4HANA Public Cloud after it has been blocked using the Blocking of Business Partner Data app under Data Protection and Privacy.

Currently, when a Business Partner is blocked, the OData API (sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartner) does not return the corresponding record. However, I can still view the Business Partner details via the Maintain Business Partner app.

Is there a way to access the blocked Business Partner details using an API with communication user or any other way to identify which Business Partners are blocked using API?

The objective is to react to any Blocked Business Partner in a SAP Integrated external application.

Please provide guidance on how to achieve this.

entry.title: Re: how to connect to ibm db2 as400 iseries using jt400.jar
entry.content:
finally, we checked that we can't connect to as 400 iseries through cloud connector and then are considering alternatives, for example, intermediate layer(eg. using aws lambda on aws to as400 on premise)

thanks

entry.title: SAP Datasphere and SAP Information Steward Connectivity
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently migrating to SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud. We have currently BO, Data Services and Information Steward solutions deployed.

We wanted to know how we can integrate SAP Information Steward with SAP Datasphere?.  What are the ways to connect IS to Datasphere?

Regards,

Nachiket

entry.title: Re: Integrating with the Alerts System API in SAP Service Cloud V2
entry.content:
@Saurabh_Kabra :

  • Currently, this feature is available in the agent desktop for both B2C and B2B customers.
  • Information can be categorized based on Group Text and Color.

entry.title: Re: Custom payroll functions - unable to find source text
entry.content:
I'm guessing there're some asynchronous work in the system.

I came across the similar issue on Friday, and it just went away on Monday.

entry.title: Re: FB02 & FB03 - Details not shown in the Layout field c...
entry.content:
Dear FernandaKlauck

Thank you for the information. But My Question is - why the details aren't displaying in the Field Transaction, 

In On-premise the transaction field shows backend posting Transaction key like..VAX,VAY,BSX 

On-Premise Screenshot attached for your reference.

Thanks

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Planning : Advance Formulas (Aggregation)
entry.content:
Hey all, 

can anyone of you help me need to calculate the product of aggregated account dimensions (Units and Lookup Price) across the Product and Time dimensions. However, when I directly multiply these accounts using Data Actions, the calculation is performed row-wise first and then aggregated, leading to incorrect results. Instead, I want to first aggregate the values by Product and Time and then perform the multiplication to ensure accuracy. Can anyone help me with how to achieve this using scripting? I have to claculate the Revenue NA for NorthEast Region 

please help

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere: On Premise SFTP connectivity
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have done this connection part, furthur when I am trying to access file from sftp to datasphere it's showing in data flow source table but when I am executing run then that run is failing and also file is getting delete from sftp why it's happening?


Please let me know if any details required.


Thanks,
Tejas

entry.title: Re: Issue with FMS on Issue for Production Quantity
entry.content:
Hi Joseph,

you can test your FMS by yourself. Open the Form and klick in the field where the magic should happen.

Then go through the menu to your query, then the variables will be filled with the data and you can see what went's wrong

regards Lothar

entry.title: Re: Joule speaks ABAP!
entry.content: Hi team, Is there any roadmap for Build code code generation for ABAP?
